## Category
**Cluster:** Endpoint Security / EDR / XDR

---

## Product Brief
1. Tanium provides an Autonomous IT platform for comprehensive cybersecurity and IT operations, offering real-time visibility and control across endpoints.
2. Their core technology focuses on real-time endpoint intelligence, enabling detection, investigation, and remediation at scale.
3. Tanium differentiates by complementing traditional EDR tools, addressing gaps in real-time, environment-wide visibility and providing swift, precise remediation capabilities.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Tanium will host a "Recharge Lounge" at the Four Seasons San Francisco for attendees to unwind and connect.
- Live product demonstrations of their Autonomous IT Platform will be available at the Four Seasons.
- A networking reception in partnership with ScreenMeet & ServiceNow is scheduled for Monday, March 23, 2026, at Holbrook House.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] How does Tanium's Autonomous IT platform integrate with existing EDR/XDR solutions to enhance overall security posture?
- [ ] What specific new features or capabilities will be showcased in the live product demonstrations at the Four Seasons?
- [ ] What are the key benefits for customers and partners attending Tanium's exclusive off-site events compared to a traditional expo booth experience?
